recommendation.riskSentence: Smart-contract exposure in Aave plus the USDC peg — not FDIC-insured and yields can move.
explanationLines: Aave v3 USDC on Base pays about 5.20% APY.
On €500, that's roughly €25.50 per year after fees (0.10%).
Risk: Smart-contract exposure in Aave plus the USDC peg — not FDIC-insured and yields can move.
